description_long: This is a rectangular, upright juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' and 'PREMIUM GRAPE JUICE' on the front, featuring a vivid image of a bunch of red grapes with green leaves. The carton is primarily white with gold accents, including a gold top panel and gold side panels, and it has a white plastic screw cap located at the top corner. The back of the carton displays detailed nutritional information and product details in multiple languages. The side panels prominently feature the brand name 'FARAGELLO' in large gold letters and additional product descriptors. The packaging appears to be made of laminated cardboard, typical for juice cartons, and is designed to be both lightweight and protective of the liquid contents inside. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for display in urban retail or convenience settings.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with a grape cluster illustration and a white screw cap. The packaging is sleek, modern, and features detailed branding and nutritional information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label, grape illustration, and most of the product branding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gold panel, large vertical 'FARAGELLO' text, and the white screw cap.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the nutritional information panel and product details in multiple languages.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with gold panel, partial branding, and the cap visible from a different angle.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: red grape cluster with green leaves
